subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, which hath been sent down in truth, yet most of the people perceive it not. Therein doth God command you unto righteousness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله قد نزل بالحق ولکن الناس اکثرهم لایشعرون و فیه یامرکم الله بالبر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @call to action
